topStories.title: Air strikes cause black rain and 'unprecedented' pollution in Tehran, scientists say
topStories.description: Air strikes have damaged at least four oil facilities since US-Israeli attacks on Iran began last month.

dailyNews.title: Energy secretary deletes claim US military escorted tanker through Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has pledged the 'free flow' of energy through the strait, a goal that has yet to be accomplished.

dailyNews.title: U.S. military contractor likely built iPhone hacking tools used by Russian spies in Ukraine
dailyNews.description: Google found a series of hacking tools they said were used by a Russian espionage group and a cybercriminal group in China. Sources from a U.S. government defense contractor said some of those hacking tools were theirs.

dailyNews.title: Erika Kirk replaces late husband Charlie Kirk on US Air Force Academy advisory board after Trump appointment
dailyNews.description: The board advises the US Department of Defense on key issues including academic standards, cadet morale and financial management.

dailyNews.title: US' "Tactical Error" Ahead Of Iran War As It Dismissed Ukraine's Plan
dailyNews.description: Months before the Iran conflict escalated, Kyiv offered Washington battle-tested technology to counter Iranian drones. The proposal was dismissed, a decision some US officials now call a major...

dailyNews.title: Iran Targets Israeli Satellite Communications Site: Report
dailyNews.description: Tehran's exchange of fire with US and Israel has continued without a pause. The war, which erupted on Feb. 28 after joint US-Israeli strikes hit Iran, has not shown signs of de-escalation so far.

dailyNews.title: Iran Expands Attacks On Israel, Gulf States As US Threatens 'Most Intense Day' Of Strikes
dailyNews.description: Iran steps up regional attacks, disrupts Hormuz oil route as US warns of intensified strikes

dailyNews.title: ‘Our hearts were shaking’: Tehran residents endure heavy Israel-US bombing
dailyNews.description: The latest attacks come a day after bombing of fuel reserves created thick plumes of smoke that turned day into night.

dailyNews.title: UK sends warship HMS Dragon to Eastern Mediterranean after Cyprus drone attack
dailyNews.description: Britain has deployed the Royal Navy destroyer HMS Dragon to the eastern Mediterranean more than a week after a drone struck its RAF Akrotiri base in Cyprus, an attack linked to escalating tensions following US and Israeli strikes on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Committed to protecting the Aravalli hills, says  Bhupender Yadav
dailyNews.description: Minister said that the government is considering the setting up of a High Powered Committee on the matter, as directed by the Supreme Court

dailyNews.title: Canadian authorities investigating gunfire at US consulate in Toronto
dailyNews.description: Police report there were no injuries after someone fired a gun at the US consulate in the early morning hours.

dailyNews.title: Canada police investigate after shots fired at US consulate in Toronto
dailyNews.description: It comes as Norwegian police investigate an explosion that occurred outside the US embassy in Oslo on Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Air strikes cause black rain and 'unprecedented' pollution in Tehran, scientists say
dailyNews.description: Air strikes have damaged at least four oil facilities since US-Israeli attacks on Iran began last month.

dailyNews.title: IEA due to meet as member states mull releasing oil reserves amid Iran war
dailyNews.description: International Energy Agency chief says talks aim to assess conditions as US-Israel war on Iran fuels global uncertainty.

dailyNews.title: US general says he ‘respects’ Iran’s fight
dailyNews.description: The chairman of the US Joint Chiefs of Staff said he “respects” Iran’s resistance in the war.

dailyNews.title: Iran fires back at Trump over threats to new Supreme Leader: ‘Be careful not to be eliminated’
dailyNews.description: Iran has warned Trump after he threatened severe consequences if Tehran disrupts oil shipments through the Strait of Hormuz. Trump also claimed the country’s new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, would not be able to “live in peace.”

dailyNews.title: US-Israel-Iran war: Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth warns Tuesday will be ‘most intense day of strikes’
dailyNews.description: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth said Tuesday would be the most intense day yet of US strikes inside Iran as the conflict entered its 11th day. Israel’s PM vowed to topple Iran’s regime, while Tehran named Mojtaba Khamenei as supreme leader and warned Donald Trump against escalating threats.

dailyNews.title: Pete Hegseth vows ‘most intense day’ of US strikes against Iran
dailyNews.description: Pete Hegseth says Donald Trump controls the pace of the war, but acknowledges that Israel has its own objectives.

dailyNews.title: US defence chief ends Iran war briefing with prayer for troops
dailyNews.description: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth recited a prayer for US troops attacking Iran, asking for strength and protection.

dailyNews.title: Legora reaches $5.55 billion valuation as AI legal tech boom endures
dailyNews.description: Legora, an AI platform for lawyers, is now valued at $5.55 billion following a $550 million Series D led by Accel to fuel its growth in the U.S.

dailyNews.title: Ted Cruz shuts down extended Iran war talk, says it's 'not Iraq' amid oil price spike
dailyNews.description: Sen. Ted Cruz said Tuesday that there was likely no possibility the Iran war would become an extended military engagement and said it was "not Iraq."

dailyNews.title: After her father's addiction led to a $91K gambling spiral, GOP Rep Erin Houchin pushes addiction reform
dailyNews.description: After her father racked up $91,000 in gambling debt, a GOP lawmaker is pushing federal action to combat addiction as sports betting expands nationwide.

dailyNews.title: Major airline suspends Abu Dhabi flights until end of year amid airspace 'uncertainty'
dailyNews.description: UAE flights are suspended after British Airways, Lufthansa cancel service to Dubai and Abu Dhabi amid the latest Middle East tensions. Airports are restricting access.

dailyNews.title: Trump ally endorses Paxton over Cornyn as GOP Senate primary heads to high-stakes Texas runoff
dailyNews.description: GOP Rep. Eric Burlison of Missouri endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton in a Lone Star State Republican U.S. Senate primary runoff.

dailyNews.title: DOJ accelerates settlement offers in Camp Lejeune water contamination cases
dailyNews.description: Camp Lejeune Justice Department settlements accelerate as Stanley Woodward approves 649 offers totaling $175 million in three weeks for contaminated water victims.

topStories.title: Energy secretary deletes claim US military escorted tanker through Hormuz
topStories.description: President Donald Trump has pledged the 'free flow' of energy through the strait, a goal that has yet to be accomplished.

topStories.description: The board advises the US Department of Defense on key issues including academic standards, cadet morale and financial management.

Israel’s PM vowed to topple Iran’s regime, while Tehran named Mojtaba Khamenei as supreme leader and warned Donald Trump against escalating threats.

topStories.description: Pete Hegseth says Donald Trump controls the pace of the war, but acknowledges that Israel has its own objectives.

topStories.title: Trump ally endorses Paxton over Cornyn as GOP Senate primary heads to high-stakes Texas runoff
topStories.description: GOP Rep. Eric Burlison of Missouri endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton in a Lone Star State Republican U.S. Senate primary runoff.

topStories.title: ICE Houston touts over 400 illegal alien child sex offenders arrested during Trump's first year back in office
topStories.description: In the first year of President Donald Trump's second term, ICE Houston arrested more than 400 illegal aliens charged or convicted for child sex offenses.

topStories.title: Trump's pick to lead the Federal Reserve meets GOP senator holding up his confirmation
topStories.description: Kevin Warsh's path to leading the Federal Reserve faces a hurdle as a Senate member holds up the nomination over ongoing Justice Department probe concerns.

topStories.title: Trump foe Fani Willis blocked yet again from collapsed RICO case as president pushes to claw back millions
topStories.description: Trump and co-defendants seek $16.8M in legal fees after Georgia DA Fani Willis was disqualified from an election case. A judge blocked Willis' challenge.

topStories.title: Iran regime cited as Trump admin set to designate Sudan’s Muslim Brotherhood a terror group
topStories.description: Trump administration designates Sudanese Muslim Brotherhood as terrorist organization amid Sudan's civil war that has seen thousands of deaths and millions of displacements.

topStories.title: Cuban activist to Trump: ‘Make Cuba great again’ by ending communist rule
topStories.description: Cuban activist Rosa María Payá appeals directly to Trump for support as Cuba faces rolling blackouts and food shortages amid deepening humanitarian crisis.

topStories.title: Trump admin pulls $120K in grants for research on LGBTQ cartoonists, ‘multiethnic’ studies, report says
topStories.description: The Trump administration reportedly pulled $120,000 in NEH grants for LGBTQ comics research and multiethnic studies, sparking controversy over academic freedom.

dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has pledged the 'free flow' of energy through the strait, a goal that has yet to be accomplished.

dailyNews.description: The Trump administration reportedly pulled $120,000 in NEH grants for LGBTQ comics research and multiethnic studies, sparking controversy over academic freedom.

dailyNews.title: U.S. Eases Limits on Russian Energy as Oil Prices Soar
dailyNews.description: The volatility in energy markets because of the war in Iran could not come at a better time for President Vladimir V. Putin.

dailyNews.title: Judge Weighs Trump Antisemitism Inquiry Seeking List of Jews From Penn
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has said it is investigating antisemitism. The government sued the University of Pennsylvania after it refused a request to provide information about Jewish faculty and staff.

dailyNews.title: Democrats Sued to Find Out Whether Trump Will Send Armed Officers to Election Sites
dailyNews.description: In a lawsuit filed Tuesday, the D.N.C. sought to compel the government to say whether it plans to deploy armed federal officers in this year’s elections.

dailyNews.title: Pentagon says about 140 U.S. service members wounded since Iran war began
dailyNews.description: President Trump says the Iran war will end "very soon," but Tehran says it's "prepared to continue attacking" indefinitely, and it won't let oil leave the Gulf.

dailyNews.title: Inside the Iran war on what Hegseth says will be most intense day of strikes
dailyNews.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said Tuesday morning that, "Today will be, yet again, our most intense day of strikes inside Iran." CBS News' Charlie D'Agata reports on the situation in the Middle East, Retired U.S. Navy Vice Admiral Robert Murrett joins with analysis and CBS News' Olivia Rinaldi has the latest from the White House.

dailyNews.title: H.R. McMaster breaks down U.S. strikes on Iran as Hegseth vows "most intense day" of attacks
dailyNews.description: H.R. McMaster, who served as President Trump's national security adviser during his first term, joins CBS News 24/7 to break down U.S. strikes on Iran after Defense Secretary Hegseth said Tuesday would be the "most intense day" of attacks on the country.

dailyNews.title: U.S.-Israel war with Iran intensifying on Day 11: What to know
dailyNews.description: President Trump said Monday that the war with Iran will end "very soon," but on the 11th day of fighting strikes are still intensifying. CBS News' Charlie D'Agata, Nancy Cordes and Edward Smith have more.

dailyNews.title: Thune stands firm on SAVE America Act despite Trump pressure
dailyNews.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune made clear that an elections bill known as the SAVE America Act faces an unlikely path to passage.

dailyNews.title: Trump order cutting ties with Anthropic likely coming this week, sources say
dailyNews.description: President Trump will issue an executive order to remove Anthropic's AI technology from agencies across the executive branch, sources familiar with the matter tell CBS News.

dailyNews.title: Russia told Trump it has not shared intelligence with Iran during war, Witkoff says
dailyNews.description: U.S. officials have said Russia has given Iran information that could help its forces strike U.S. military assets in the Middle East, MS Now has reported.

dailyNews.title: 'Forever war': Democrats rebut Trump's assertion that Iran war nearing end
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump on Monday suggested the war may be nearing an end, sending markets soaring and oil plummeting.

dailyNews.title: Google deepens Pentagon AI push after Anthropic sues Trump administration
dailyNews.description: Google is rolling out a feature that lets civilian and military personnel build custom AI agents for unclassified work on the Pentagon's enterprise AI portal.
